# Open Graph Image Placeholder
# 
# Create an OG image (1200x630px recommended) and save as og-image.png
# 
# Tips for OG image:
# - Size: 1200x630 pixels (1.91:1 ratio)
# - Show app screenshot with neon UI
# - Add text: "ViceBD Weather App"
# - Include weather icons + GTAVC aesthetic
# - Export as PNG for quality
#
# Tools to create:
# - Canva (free templates)
# - Figma (free)
# - Screenshot + edit in Paint/Photoshop
